nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for ruvix-vecgraph crate: kernel-resident vector/graph stores (ADR-087) with proof-gated mutations, depending on ruvix-types and ruvix-region.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documents the ruvix-vecgraph crate's kernel-resident vector/graph stores, proof-gated syscalls (vector_get, vector_put_proved, graph_apply_proved), HNSW indexing, coherence tracking, and SIMD distance functions.

nodes.name: coherence.rs
nodes.summary: Coherence metadata tracker assigning per-vector scores (0.0-1.0) and recording mutation timestamps for kernel-resident vectors.

nodes.name: CoherenceConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration knobs (decay, thresholds) governing CoherenceTracker scoring behavior.

nodes.name: CoherenceTracker
nodes.summary: Tracks per-vector coherence metadata with score(), update() and decay over time.

nodes.name: graph_store.rs
nodes.summary: Kernel-resident graph store implementing proof-gated mutations (add/remove node, add/remove edge) via slab regions, with partition metadata and witness emission.

nodes.name: GraphNode
nodes.summary: Slab-backed graph node carrying its key, up to MAX_EDGES_PER_NODE edges, and coherence metadata.

nodes.name: EdgeEntry
nodes.summary: Edge record (destination node + weight) stored inline within GraphNode.

nodes.name: PartitionMeta
nodes.summary: Mincut-aware partition metadata associated with graph mutations.

nodes.name: GraphMutationResult
nodes.summary: Result type returned by graph_apply_proved carrying attestation and partition info.

nodes.name: GraphStoreBuilder
nodes.summary: Builder for KernelGraphStore configuring capacity, proof policy and coherence settings.

nodes.name: KernelGraphStore
nodes.summary: Generic kernel-resident graph store over a MemoryBacking; enforces capability + proof checks before applying GraphMutation.

nodes.name: compute_graph_mutation_hash
nodes.summary: Computes the canonical SHA-256 hash bound to a GraphMutation for proof verification.

nodes.name: hnsw.rs
nodes.summary: HNSW (Hierarchical Navigable Small World) approximate-nearest-neighbor index backed by slab-allocated nodes.

nodes.name: HnswConfig
nodes.summary: HNSW build parameters: M, ef_construction, max_elements.

nodes.name: HnswNode
nodes.summary: Single HNSW graph node with layer connections, slab-resident.

nodes.name: HnswRegion
nodes.summary: HNSW index region generic over MemoryBacking; supports insert and k-NN search with ef parameter.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Crate root re-exporting public modules (coherence, graph_store, hnsw, proof_policy, simd_distance, vector_store, witness) and defining the crate-wide Result and VecGraphStats types.

nodes.name: VecGraphStats
nodes.summary: Aggregate statistics struct exposing vector_reads, vector_writes, rejections, and witness counts.

nodes.name: proof_policy.rs
nodes.summary: Proof policy and verifier types enforcing tier requirements, nonce uniqueness, and proof freshness for vector/graph mutations.

nodes.name: ProofPolicy
nodes.summary: Policy descriptor specifying required proof tier (standard/deep/reflex) and freshness window.

nodes.name: NonceTracker
nodes.summary: Tracks consumed nonces to prevent replay of proof tokens.

nodes.name: ProofVerifier
nodes.summary: Verifies ProofToken against ProofPolicy, mutation hash, and NonceTracker, returning attestations.

nodes.name: simd_distance.rs
nodes.summary: SIMD-accelerated distance kernels (cosine, L2-squared, dot, L2-norm) with NEON, AVX2 and scalar fallbacks plus runtime capability detection.

nodes.name: SimdCapabilities
nodes.summary: Runtime-detected SIMD feature flags (AVX2, NEON) used to dispatch the correct kernel.

nodes.name: cosine_similarity
nodes.summary: Dispatch-front cosine similarity over f32 slices, selecting NEON/AVX2/scalar implementation.

nodes.name: euclidean_distance_squared
nodes.summary: Dispatch-front squared Euclidean distance with SIMD fallbacks.

nodes.name: dot_product
nodes.summary: Dispatch-front dot product across SIMD backends.

nodes.name: l2_norm
nodes.summary: Dispatch-front L2 norm with SIMD acceleration.

nodes.name: batch_cosine_distances
nodes.summary: Batched cosine distances over an iterator of candidate vectors, returning DistanceResult ranked output.

nodes.name: DistanceResult
nodes.summary: Per-vector batch distance result struct.

nodes.name: vector_store.rs
nodes.summary: Kernel-resident vector store with proof-gated vector_put and READ-capability vector_get; integrates coherence tracking, HNSW indexing, and witness logging.

nodes.name: VectorEntry
nodes.summary: Slab-stored vector entry: data and embedded coherence metadata header.

nodes.name: VectorStoreBuilder
nodes.summary: Builder configuring dimensions, capacity, proof policy and coherence for KernelVectorStore.

nodes.name: KernelVectorStore
nodes.summary: Generic kernel vector store enforcing capability+proof checks on writes and emitting witness attestations.

nodes.name: compute_vector_mutation_hash
nodes.summary: Canonical SHA-256 hash bound to (VectorKey, vector data) for proof verification.

nodes.name: witness.rs
nodes.summary: Append-only witness log recording attestations for every vector/graph mutation accepted by the kernel.

nodes.name: WitnessEntryType
nodes.summary: Discriminator marking whether a witness entry records a vector or graph mutation.

nodes.name: WitnessEntry
nodes.summary: Single witness log record (hash, attestation, type, timestamp).

nodes.name: WitnessLog
nodes.summary: Append-only log generic over a MemoryBacking-backed AppendOnlyRegion, providing append and integrity verification.

nodes.name: proof_gated.rs
nodes.summary: Integration tests asserting vector/graph mutations require valid proofs, correct nonces, sufficient capability rights, and emit consistent witness log entries.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the cognitive_demo example crate showcasing the full RuVix kernel feature set.

nodes.name: pipeline_bench.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for the cognitive demo pipeline: sensor adapter, feature extractor, attestor, full pipeline, event generation, embedding computation, proof generation, and batch sizes.

nodes.name: benchmark_sensor_adapter
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark measuring SensorAdapter tick throughput.

nodes.name: benchmark_feature_extractor
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark measuring FeatureExtractor embedding throughput.

nodes.name: benchmark_attestor
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark measuring Attestor proof generation latency.

nodes.name: benchmark_full_pipeline
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark of the end-to-end CognitivePipeline.

nodes.name: benchmark_batch_sizes
nodes.summary: Parameterized benchmark sweeping pipeline batch sizes.

nodes.name: cognitive_demo.rs
nodes.summary: Executable example that prints the demo manifest and runs the cognitive pipeline end-to-end.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Demo entry point printing manifest info and invoking run_pipeline().

nodes.name: print_manifest_info
nodes.summary: Pretty-prints the DemoManifest configuration including components, regions, and proof policies.

nodes.name: run_pipeline
nodes.summary: Builds a CognitivePipeline, drives ticks, and emits a coverage report.

nodes.name: attestor.rs
nodes.summary: Attestor component: receives AttestationRequests, computes mutation hashes, generates ProofToken/ProofAttestation pairs across proof tiers.

nodes.name: AttestationRequest
nodes.summary: Inbound attestation request carrying region, payload, tier, and capability.

nodes.name: Attestor
nodes.summary: Pipeline component generating cryptographic attestations and proofs for downstream mutations.

nodes.name: AttestorStats
nodes.summary: Counters for attestations generated, rejected, and per-tier breakdown.

nodes.name: coordinator.rs
nodes.summary: Coordinator component orchestrating pipeline state transitions, rollback hooks, and inter-component message routing.

nodes.name: Coordinator
nodes.summary: Pipeline orchestrator implementing the Component trait, driving state machine transitions.

nodes.name: PipelineCoordinatorState
nodes.summary: Internal coordinator state machine (Idle, Running, RollingBack, etc.).

nodes.name: CoordinatorStats
nodes.summary: Counters of state transitions, rollbacks triggered, and ticks processed.

nodes.name: feature_extractor.rs
nodes.summary: FeatureExtractor component converting PerceptionEvents into VectorEmbeddings via SHA-256-based pseudo-embedding and submitting them to a kernel vector store.

nodes.name: FeatureExtractor
nodes.summary: Component implementing PerceptionEvent -> VectorEmbedding transformation with kernel syscall integration.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Components module barrel: re-exports Attestor, Coordinator, FeatureExtractor, ReasoningEngine, SensorAdapter and defines the Component trait + KernelInterface mock.

nodes.name: Component
nodes.summary: Trait implemented by every pipeline stage (tick(), name(), stats accessors).

nodes.name: ComponentTickResult
nodes.summary: Result emitted by a Component tick (Idle, Produced, Halted, Error).

nodes.name: PipelineMessage
nodes.summary: Tagged union of inter-component messages (perception event, embedding, mutation, attestation).

nodes.name: KernelInterface
nodes.summary: Mock kernel facade exposing syscalls (region/queue/vector_store/capability) used by demo components.

nodes.name: KernelStats
nodes.summary: Aggregated counters of kernel syscalls observed across the demo.

nodes.name: reasoning_engine.rs
nodes.summary: ReasoningEngine component consuming VectorEmbeddings and emitting ReasoningMutations applied via proof-gated syscalls.

nodes.name: ReasoningEngine
nodes.summary: Demo reasoning engine implementing the Component trait, producing graph mutations from embeddings.

nodes.name: ReasoningStats
nodes.summary: Counters of mutations produced, rejected, and reasoning latency.

nodes.name: sensor_adapter.rs
nodes.summary: SensorAdapter component emitting synthetic PerceptionEvents into the pipeline queue.

nodes.name: SensorAdapter
nodes.summary: Component generating deterministic synthetic sensor events for pipeline driving.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Cognitive_demo crate root: re-exports components/manifest/pipeline/stats modules and defines PerceptionEvent, VectorEmbedding, ReasoningMutation core types.

nodes.name: PerceptionEvent
nodes.summary: Sensor-originated event consumed by the FeatureExtractor (kind, payload, timestamp).

nodes.name: VectorEmbedding
nodes.summary: Output embedding (key + f32 vector) produced by FeatureExtractor and consumed by ReasoningEngine.

nodes.name: ReasoningMutation
nodes.summary: Mutation request produced by ReasoningEngine targeting a graph or vector region.

nodes.name: manifest.rs
nodes.summary: Static manifest describing demo components, region budgets, capability requirements, proof policies, rollback hooks, and witness log configuration.

nodes.name: DemoManifest
nodes.summary: Top-level manifest aggregating all demo configuration (components, regions, policies, hooks).

nodes.name: ManifestVersion
nodes.summary: Semver-style version triple stamped on the manifest.

nodes.name: DemoComponent
nodes.summary: Per-component manifest entry (type, syscalls, capabilities, region bindings).

nodes.name: ComponentType
nodes.summary: Discriminator: SensorAdapter, FeatureExtractor, ReasoningEngine, Attestor, Coordinator.

nodes.name: SyscallUsage
nodes.summary: Declared syscall (name, count) used by a component.

nodes.name: CapabilityRequirement
nodes.summary: Capability requirement for a component (CapType + rights mask).

nodes.name: CapType
nodes.summary: Capability kind (Region, Queue, VectorStore, ProofIssuer, etc.).

nodes.name: DemoRegion
nodes.summary: Manifest entry for a kernel region (type, size, policy, witness type id).

nodes.name: DemoRegionType
nodes.summary: Region kind: Slab, AppendOnly, Vector, Graph, etc.

nodes.name: ProofPolicyConfig
nodes.summary: Per-component proof tier mapping for the manifest.

nodes.name: ComponentProofTier
nodes.summary: Maps a ComponentType to a required ProofTier.

nodes.name: RollbackHookConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration describing what triggers a rollback and which region/component is affected.

nodes.name: RollbackTrigger
nodes.summary: Enum of rollback triggers (ProofFailure, BudgetExceeded, ManualAbort, etc.).

nodes.name: WitnessLogConfig
nodes.summary: Witness log sizing and retention parameters.

nodes.name: pipeline.rs
nodes.summary: CognitivePipeline orchestrating SensorAdapter -> FeatureExtractor -> ReasoningEngine -> Attestor -> Coordinator over a shared KernelInterface and producing PipelineResult.

nodes.name: PipelineConfig
nodes.summary: Tunable runtime parameters (tick budget, max events) for the demo pipeline.

nodes.name: PipelineState
nodes.summary: High-level pipeline state machine values surfaced to callers.

nodes.name: CognitivePipeline
nodes.summary: Top-level pipeline composing all five demo components and the KernelInterface.

nodes.name: PipelineResult
nodes.summary: Final pipeline outcome bundling coverage, stats, and witness summary.

nodes.name: CheckpointData
nodes.summary: Serializable snapshot of pipeline progress used by Coordinator rollback hooks.

nodes.name: stats.rs
nodes.summary: Statistics, coverage matrix, and feature-coverage reporting types for the cognitive demo.

nodes.name: SyscallStats
nodes.summary: Counters of every syscall invoked from KernelInterface during a run.

nodes.name: FeatureCoverage
nodes.summary: Aggregated coverage across syscalls, regions, proof tiers, and components.

nodes.name: SyscallCoverage
nodes.summary: Per-syscall coverage with detail rows.

nodes.name: SyscallCoverageDetail
nodes.summary: Detail row capturing a single syscall's expected vs observed counts.

nodes.name: RegionCoverage
nodes.summary: Coverage of region types exercised by the demo.

nodes.name: ProofCoverage
nodes.summary: Coverage of proof tiers exercised during a pipeline run.

nodes.name: ComponentCoverage
nodes.summary: Coverage of which components ran and how many ticks they performed.

nodes.name: CoverageReport
nodes.summary: Human-readable coverage report emitted at end of a demo run.

nodes.name: FeatureMatrix
nodes.summary: Matrix mapping (component x feature) to a covered/uncovered cell for traceability.

nodes.name: feature_coverage.rs
nodes.summary: Integration tests verifying the demo exercises every syscall, region type, proof tier, and component, and validates manifest invariants.
